title: Jungle Update
description:
Mod has been merged! - https://modrinth.com/mod/jaizmod
This is to keep the work load down for myself, and keep updates coming!

Adds new jungle related features
body:
Mod has been merged! - https://modrinth.com/mod/jaizmod
This is to keep the work load down for myself, and keep updates coming!

Adds 2 new biomes, a new entity, a new structure, and new terrain generation

Jungle Temples have been revamped - now with more loot, traps and variations. (old jungle temples will still spawn)

Mahogany Forest - a jungle subbiome appears on the surface and houses a new wood type - mahogany.

Fruit Bat Caves are found under mahogany forests, and will generate with the new fruit bat mob inside of them

Fruit Bats - these mobs are found in the new biomes and after a certain amount of time will at random drop a new item called Guano.

Guano can be used as a decoration block, as a projectile weapon, or as an application method for the effect "stinky". This effect will prevent any mob with the "ActiveTargetGoal" from pursuing the entity with the effect.
